concerns.text: FR-001 mandates downloading from 'Materials Project (elastic modulus)'. The plan (Section 'Dataset Strategy' and 'Dataset Fit Note') explicitly states no verified public URL exists for this without an API key and proposes a fallback to synthetic data or skipping. The plan does not define a concrete task to satisfy the 'Materials Project' requirement, leaving FR-001 unbacked for the Elastic Modulus dataset.

SC-005 requires measuring consistency across 'three distinct materials datasets (Elastic Modulus, Band Gap, Thermal Conductivity)' via ANOVA. The plan acknowledges the likely absence of the Elastic Modulus dataset (Section 'Dataset Strategy'). Without a concrete plan to acquire or substitute a verified third dataset, the ANOVA test required by SC-005 cannot be executed as specified, leaving the success criterion unmeasurable.
